request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that over 70% of NATO allies still don't meet the 2% defense spending target? While some argue for more civil defense spending, the real issue is burden-sharing. Our national security depends on allies pulling their weight. Let's focus on holding them accountable rather than diverting resources to unproven preparedness programs. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurdenSharing
